body:
Parent issue: #126

Stage: setup-apply-route

## Task

Implement the next small staged child under #126: add deterministic `/setup apply` support for applying an approved setup plan. Keep it conservative and privileged: require explicit `/setup apply`, issue-only routing, strong route authorization, and deterministic allowlisted mutations only. Implement repo variable create/update support for approved Sepo setup variables such as AGENT_HANDLE, assign-to-agent behavior, project-management enable/mode, and configured Project ID/URL/owner/title where these fit existing config patterns. Do not let the model directly run arbitrary `gh variable set`; use typed helper/CLI code with validation and an audit summary. Do not create/link GitHub Projects, create Project fields/views, sync Project fields, or change project-manager field-apply behavior in this child. Preserve behavior from stacked PRs #134, #136, #141, #143, #145, and #147, and add focused tests for route parsing, authorization, explicit confirmation/apply boundaries, allowlisted variable validation, dry-run/error behavior, and docs consistency.

## Base

- base_pr: #147

<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator parent:126 stage:setup-apply-route state:done parent_round:6 -->

**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-148/codex-25349663150`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/149

Added an issue-only `/setup apply` path that bypasses the model and deterministically applies validated, allowlisted Sepo setup repository variables, with stable audit-comment updates, assignment toggle support, project planning target variables, docs, and focused tests. Verified with the .agent build, setup/route/CLI test suite, resolve-dispatch test, and `git diff --check`.
